title: PluginHealth
description: Plugin health check response for the Unified AI Plugin Platform. Corresponds to the HealthResponse message in the core plugin.proto and the HealthCheckResponse in the Go plugin template.

status.description: Plugin health status: serving (healthy and ready), not_serving (unhealthy or starting), unknown (status cannot be determined)

healthy.description: Simple healthy flag (true when status is 'serving')

message.description: Human-readable status message or error description

uptime_seconds.description: Plugin uptime in seconds since initialization

metrics.description: Key-value health metrics (e.g. memory usage, request count, queue depth)

checks.description: Individual health check results for sub-components
